expects.explore_hint: No natural trust.bundle producer in the current skill surface. pull-work writes a Markdown artifact but has no record-evidence call. Flag for design: category (c) no-producer gate per ADR 0016 P-d plan.
expects.description: A ready work item is selected with scope and acceptance context.

expects.explore_hint: No natural trust.bundle producer in the current skill surface. pickup-probe writes a Markdown artifact but has no record-evidence call. Flag for design: category (c) no-producer gate per ADR 0016 P-d plan.
expects.description: Pickup Probe evidence is recorded before planning: goal fit and scope, blockers and dependencies, dependency freshness, acceptance criteria quality, provider state, risk, stop-short risks, planning readiness, decisions, unresolved questions, accepted gaps, probe_status, probe_artifact_ref, grouping decision, expected modified files, and conflict risks.

expects.explore_hint: No natural trust.bundle producer in the current skill surface. Decisions are captured in Markdown artifacts but not as structured claims. Flag for design: category (c) no-producer gate per ADR 0016 P-d plan.
expects.description: Planning is blocked until pickup Probe decisions are captured in the pull-work or plan handoff artifact, or unresolved questions are explicitly recorded as accepted gaps. Stale broad continuation language after a merge is not sufficient for planning newly selected work.
The implementation plan names files, changes, acceptance evidence, and sequencing.
The implementation scope records changed files and excludes unrelated work.
Relevant tests or checks have evidence tied to the implemented change.
Policy compliance evidence is attached when policy gates apply.
expects.explore_hint: Use as advisory evidence for scope, security, privacy, release, or repository policy checks.

expects.description: The change is ready for merge review based on scope, evidence, and unresolved risks.

expects.explore_hint: No natural trust.bundle producer in the current skill surface. PR creation is a provider action; no record-evidence call exists after PR open. Flag for design: category (c) no-producer gate per ADR 0016 P-d plan.
expects.description: A pull request exists with linked work, implementation summary, and verification evidence.
CI and review status support a merge-ready decision.

expects.explore_hint: No natural trust.bundle producer in the current skill surface. record-learning writes learning.json which is a structured sidecar but not a trust.bundle claim. Flag for design: category (c) no-producer gate per ADR 0016 P-d plan.
expects.description: Durable decision evidence from the build is recorded.
